sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n116075" key="w)i/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὠία</orth> or <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὤια</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n116075.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ᾤα.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
